shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

shorts.title: Lackawanna County closes bridge due to safety concerns
shorts.title_distilled: Lackawanna County closes bridge due to safety concerns.
shorts.description: NEWTON TWP., LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — The Newton Township Bridge on Airport Drive and Route 307 is closed indefinitely due to safety concerns. The decision was made by the county following recommendation from its Roads & Bridges Department and County Engineer, as they say the structure's headwall is unsafe for traffic. A new traffic pattern [...]

The decision was made by the county following recommendation from its Roads & Bridges Department and County Engineer, as they say the structure's headwall is unsafe for traffic. A new traffic pattern [...]

shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — More than 100 local medical students learned where they'll be starting their careers. For Dunmore native Gina Tallo, she matched with [...]
